summary: Journey page plain-language signals feature tested successfully. Raw email engagement metrics (opens, clicks, unique) have been transformed into meaningful plain-language signals. Coach Watch Recent Signals now shows phrases like 'Coach opened your message', 'Coach engaged with your content', 'No engagement with your last message'. Key Contacts status lines use engagement language. No raw 'Opens | Clicks | Unique' row visible anywhere.
critical_code_review_comments: CoachWatchCard.js interpretSignals() lines 128-149: Recent signals use plain language - 'Coach replied to your message', 'Coach engaged with your content', 'Coach viewed your message multiple times', 'Coach opened your message', 'No engagement with your last message', 'No signals yet'
Priority order correctly implemented: reply > click > multiple opens > single open > no engagement

JourneyPage.js lines 933-956: Key Contacts status lines use engagement-interpreted language - 'Replied to your message', 'Engaged with your highlight link', 'Viewed your message multiple times', 'Opened your last message', 'No engagement with your outreach', 'No engagement yet'
Communication & Activity card (lines 1009-1026) shows only: Outreach, Replies, Interactions, Last Active - NO Opens/Clicks/Unique
Summary text in CoachWatchCard uses plain language descriptions of engagement, not raw metric counts
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Stanford (0 outreach, no coaches), Emory (7 interactions, has outreach data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plain-language signals feature complete. Key test IDs: coach-watch-card, coach-watch-signals-toggle, coach-watch-signals-list, key-contacts-card, communication-activity-card. LOGIN: Fill credentials and press Enter (button click may not work reliably). Stanford journey (e02f08c6-7c47-430a-aa8d-787a6fbeae00) has no data - shows 'No signals yet'. Emory journey (7c735c7b-b068-4741-a5c4-95860c3b3700) has outreach but no opens - shows 'No engagement with your last message'.
